mapper.select: SELECT MEMBER_SEQ , LOGIN_ID , MEMBER_PWD , MEMBER_EMAIL , MEMBER_TEL_NO , MEMBER_NICKNM , MEMBER_DELETED_DTM , MEMBER_LAST_LOGIN_DTM , MEMBER_ST , CRT_DTM , UPD_DTM FROM MEMBER_INFO WHERE LOGIN_ID = #{login_id} AND MEMBER_DELETED_DTM IS NULL AND MEMBER_ST = 'JOIN'

SELECT MEMBER_SEQ , LOGIN_ID , MEMBER_PWD , MEMBER_EMAIL , MEMBER_TEL_NO , MEMBER_NICKNM , MEMBER_DELETED_DTM , MEMBER_LAST_LOGIN_DTM , MEMBER_ST , CRT_DTM , UPD_DTM FROM MEMBER_INFO WHERE LOGIN_ID = #{login_id} AND MEMBER_PWD = MD5(#{member_pwd}) AND MEMBER_DELETED_DTM IS NULL AND MEMBER_ST = 'JOIN'
mapper.update: UPDATE MEMBER_INFO SET MEMBER_DELETED_DTM = NOW() , MEMBER_NICKNM = '탈퇴한 회원' WHERE MEMBER_SEQ = #{member_seq}
mapper.select: SELECT LOGIN_ID FROM MEMBER_INFO WHERE MEMBER_TEL_NO = #{member_tel_no} AND MEMBER_DELETED_DTM IS NULL LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE MEMBER_INFO SET MEMBER_PWD = #{member_pwd}, UPD_DTM = NOW() WHERE LOGIN_ID = #{login_id}
mapper.select: SELECT MEMBER_SEQ , MEMBER_EMAIL , MEMBER_NICKNM FROM MEMBER_INFO WHERE MEMBER_SEQ = #{member_seq}
